attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS)

attributes.Sql Query:

STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.JE_CATEGORY_NAME, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ACCOUNTING_ENTRY_STATUS_CODE, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ACCOUNTING_ENTRY_TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.AMB_CONTEXT_CODE, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PRODUCT_RULE_TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PRODUCT_RULE_CODE, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PRODUCT_RULE_VERSION, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.DOC_SEQUENCE_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.DOC_SEQUENCE_VALUE, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ACCOUNTING_BATCH_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.COMPLETION_ACCT_SEQ_VERSION_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.CLOSE_ACCT_SEQ_VERSION_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.COMPLETION_ACCT_SEQ_VALUE, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.CLOSE_ACCT_SEQ_VALUE, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.BUDGET_VERSION_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.FUNDS_STATUS_CODE, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ENCUMBRANCE_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.REFERENCE_DATE, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.COMPLETED_DATE, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PERIOD_NAME, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PACKET_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.COMPLETION_ACCT_SEQ_ASSIGN_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.CLOSE_ACCT_SEQ_ASSIGN_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.DOC_CATEGORY_CODE, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.GROUP_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.DOC_SEQUENCE_VERSION_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.DOC_SEQUENCE_ASSIGN_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.UPG_BATCH_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.UPG_SOURCE_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.UPG_VALID_FLAG, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ZERO_AMOUNT_FLAG, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PARENT_AE_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PARENT_AE_LINE_NUM, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ACCRUAL_REVERSAL_FLAG, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.MERGE_EVENT_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.NEED_BAL_FLAG, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS,
 (
 select  AE_HEADER_ID ,APPLICATION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS
 minus
 select  AE_HEADER_ID ,APPLICATION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.AE_HEADER_ID = STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.AE_HEADER_ID and ACM.APPLICATION_ID=STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.APPLICATION_ID 
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.REFRESH_DATETIME
